# Agents.as

> Agents.as is an AI-agent-as-a-service subscription for South African
> businesses. Customers get a dedicated AI agent trained on their industry,
> tools, and tone of voice. The agent qualifies leads, drafts documents,
> answers clients, and handles repetitive operational work around the clock.
> Agents go live within 48 hours of sign-up. Pricing is a flat monthly
> subscription in South African rand (ZAR), starting at R499/month, and every
> plan begins with a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

Key facts:

- Setup time: most agents are live within 48 hours of sign-up; Enterprise
  deployments with custom integrations may take up to one week.
- Availability: agents work 24/7 inside the customer's existing tools
  (email, Slack, WhatsApp, CRM, dashboard).
- Industries covered: real estate, legal, marketing, finance, healthcare,
  and e-commerce, with multi-industry coverage on higher plans.
- Pricing (ZAR, per month): Starter R499 (one industry, up to 1 000 tasks),
  Professional R1 499 (multi-industry, up to 5 000 tasks, custom
  integrations), Enterprise R4 999 (unlimited tasks, custom workflows,
  on-premise deployment, SLA).
- Trial and cancellation: 14-day free trial on every plan, no credit card
  to start, cancel anytime with one click and no cancellation fees.
- Data: encrypted in transit and at rest; customer data is never sold and
  never used to train models for other customers; POPIA rights honoured;
  Enterprise supports on-premise deployment.
- Human oversight: outputs in regulated fields (legal, healthcare, finance)
  are drafts for professional review, not professional advice.
- Provenance: the Agents.as website itself was designed, written, and coded
  by an AI agent — the product demonstrating itself.

## Pages

- [Home](/): product overview, live interactive demo, industry
  capabilities, pricing, and FAQ.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): data collection, protection, retention, and
  POPIA rights.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): subscription terms, free trial, cancellation,
  acceptable use, and liability.
